mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_article (user_id, category_id, title, content, cover_image, status, view_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{coverImage}, #{status}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM blog_article
category_id = #{categoryId}
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_article SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
